caption: Step 1: Open Zoho Invoice - free online invoicing tool for businesses
description: Open Zoho Invoice - free online invoicing tool for businesses
narration: We start on Zoho Invoice, which turns raw work into something a client can actually pay.
fallback_narration: We open Zoho Invoice and set the stage.

caption: Step 2: Open the free invoice generator page - no login required
description: Open the free invoice generator page - no login required
narration: Then we jump straight to the free generator. No login detour, just the useful part.
fallback_narration: Straight to the free generator. No login detour.

caption: Step 3: Enter business details: company name, contact, and address
description: Enter business details: company name, contact, and address
narration: Now the target comes into focus. We enter business details. Every future rerun gets cheaper because of this little moment.
fallback_narration: First, fill the business identity so the invoice knows who is billing.

caption: Step 4: Enter Bill To details for Acme Corp International
description: Enter Bill To details for Acme Corp International
narration: Now the client details go in, and the document starts changing from form fields into a real bill.
fallback_narration: Now the client details go in, and the invoice starts feeling real.

caption: Step 5: Set invoice number to INV-2026-001
narration: A good invoice number looks small, but it is what makes the document traceable later.
fallback_narration: Set the invoice number so this draft becomes trackable.

caption: Step 6: Add line item 1 with quantity, rate, and GST
description: Add line item 1 with quantity, rate, and GST
narration: The first line item puts real billable work on the page, and suddenly the invoice has a backbone.
fallback_narration: Line item one puts real billable work on the page.

caption: Step 7: Add line item 2: UI/UX Design services
description: Add line item 2: UI/UX Design services
narration: Now we add design work, which makes the scope feel broader and the pricing more believable.
fallback_narration: Second line item adds design work to the story.

caption: Step 8: Add line item 3: annual server hosting
description: Add line item 3: annual server hosting
narration: Hosting closes the loop here. One more line item, and the invoice feels complete instead of decorative.
fallback_narration: Third line item covers hosting, and the invoice gets its full shape.

caption: Step 9: Add payment notes and terms for the client
description: Add payment notes and terms for the client
narration: Payment notes matter more than people admit. This is where clarity saves follow-up emails.
fallback_narration: Now we add payment notes, so the handoff is clear.

caption: Step 10: Review subtotal, GST breakdown, and grand total
description: Review subtotal, GST breakdown, and grand total
narration: Then we do the fast finance check: subtotal, tax, and final amount.
fallback_narration: Quick total check: subtotal, GST, and final amount.

caption: Step 11: Use Download/Print to export the invoice as PDF
description: Use Download/Print to export the invoice as PDF
narration: Once the numbers look right, download is the handoff from draft to deliverable.
fallback_narration: Download or print, and the invoice is ready to leave the browser.

caption: Step 12: Tutorial complete - create professional GST invoices in minutes
description: Tutorial complete - create professional GST invoices in minutes
narration: Final beat. We went from a blank form to a client-ready invoice.
